Rationale: Sectoral data protection framework exists (limited to commercial transactions, excludes government)
Computer misuse/criminal law exists but not a dedicated cybersecurity framework

Minimum data retention period identified: This provision requires data users to establish a disposal schedule for inactive personal data with a specified 24-month period, effectively setting a minimum retention period of 24 months for inactiv

Government access to personal data identified: This provision grants the public prosecutor the power to compel communications service providers to intercept and retain specified communications, or to authorize police to install interception device
